color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
tmux/byobu:
/ar:tabs - List all sessions
/ar:tm [list|create|cleanup] - Manage sessions

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AI works independently
Best for clear tasks
──────────
/ar:go <instructions>

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Best for multi-step projects
──────────
Create new plan
/ar:plannew <instructions>
──────────
Refine plan
/ar:planrefine <instructions>
──────────
Update plan
/ar:planupdate <instructions>
──────────
Execute plan
/ar:planprocess <instructions>

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redirect dangerous commands to safer alternatives:
/ar:no <pattern> 'why blocked'
Block in this session
/ar:ok <pattern>
Allow in this session
/ar:clear [pattern]
Clear session blocks
/ar:globalno <pattern> 'why blocked'
Block in ALL sessions
/ar:globalok <pattern>
Allow in ALL sessions
/ar:globalstatus
Show global blocks

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
File Controls:
/ar:a - Allow all file creation
/ar:j - Require justification before creating files
/ar:f - Find existing only (block all new files)
/ar:st - Show current policy

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 18px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 STEP 3
AI WORKS AUTONOMOUSLY
🔄 Loops until complete:
1️⃣ IMPLEMENT
2️⃣ EVALUATE
3️⃣ VERIFY
(You can step away!)
